name: rewst-mcp
description: Operate and monitor Rewst RPA across every client org from the terminal or your AI agent: workflow execution health, failure triage, automation ROI, dormant-workflow cleanup, cross-org config drift, and integration-pack coverage - the multi-tenant answers the web console makes you assemble one org at a time.

rewst_base_url.title: REWST_BASE_URL
rewst_base_url.description: Rewst API base URL for your region. Defaults to the US (https://api.rewst.io); set this for EU/AU or other regional instances.

rewst_api_token.title: REWST_API_TOKEN
rewst_api_token.description: Rewst API token from an API client you create in the Rewst console (sent as a bearer token).
